backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing the math game backend with functions to generate random arithmetic problems (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division), submit scores, and retrieve a sorted top-10 leaderboard.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the fix for visibly rendering arithmetic problems during gameplay to the file `useGameState.ts` with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and chart tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Mental Math Trainer app that mounts the React app at `#root` and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing navigation between start, game, and results views using local state, passing score and callback props to child screens.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Custom hook encapsulating all game logic including problem fetching, answer handling, score tracking, feedback flashes, and a retry mechanism to fetch the first problem once the actor becomes available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameTimer.ts: Custom hook managing a 2-minute countdown timer with start/stop controls, formatted time output, progress percentage, urgency flag, and a time-up callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, exposing identity state, login/logout functions, and login status via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for generating problems, fetching the leaderboard, and submitting scores with cache invalidation on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark game-themed design system with OKLCH CSS custom properties for colors, including neon, orange, electric, and pink accent tokens.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/GameScreen.tsx: Active gameplay screen component that displays a countdown timer bar, current arithmetic problem, score/accuracy HUD, and an answer input field; uses useGameState and useGameTimer hooks to manage problem fetching, answer submission, and game-end callback.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsScreen.tsx: Post-game results screen that shows the player's score with a contextual message, allows name entry and leaderboard score submission via useSubmitScore, and displays a top-10 leaderboard fetched with useGetLeaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/StartScreen.tsx: Landing/start screen that displays the MathSprint logo, game title, a rules card explaining the 2-minute challenge and four operations, and a Start Game button.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with Space Grotesk/Inter fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens (neon, game-bg, game-card, etc.), custom shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, feature list, architectural notes, and known issues; currently flagged as a fix request for the math problem not displaying during gameplay.
